subject: [GITLAB] Add Docker Entrypoint to gitlab-ci.yml
commit_message:
[GITLAB] Add Docker Entrypoint to gitlab-ci.yml

Add entrypoint to each of the images within the gitlab-ci.yml

Change-Id: I884ee5aaf35fbeffc5807e649a88b7f35e55fa5c
Issue-ID: OOM-2910
Signed-off-by: rope252 <gareth.roper@est.tech>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 11 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4461/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4461/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4461/ )
